ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the car was manufactured */,
  "car_variant" TEXT /* Variant of the car model */,
  "selling_price" INTEGER /* Selling price of the car */,
  "kilometers_driven" INTEGER /* Number of kilometers driven by the car */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the car */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., 1st Owner, 2nd Owner) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the car is available */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the car */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the car */,
  "mileage_date" TEXT /* Date when the kilometers driven was last recorded */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the car (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the car (e.g., sunroof, navigation system) */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of any remaining manufacturer warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager responsible for the location */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., Email, Phone) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Individual, Business) */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first interacted with the dealership */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" INTEGER /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the car */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" INTEGER /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card) */,
  "installment_plan" INTEGER /* Whether the sale is part of an installment plan */,
  "installment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the installment plan in months */,
  "down_payment" INTEGER /* Amount of the down payment */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment */,
  "sales_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., Completed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sales representative works */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the sales representative (e.g., Senior Sales Rep, Junior Sales Rep) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales representative */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales amount made by the sales representative */,
  "total_commissions" INTEGER /* Total commissions earned by the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reps_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "after_sales_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car that received the service */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who received the service */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was performed */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service provided */,
  "service_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_after_sales_services_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_after_sales_services_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Sales Rep, Inventory Manager, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., View Sales, Edit Inventory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
